full_text: Hardik Pandya to Ervine, Caught&Bowled!! Hardik Pandya strikes in his first over. 129kph, back of a length, Ervine walks down the track and moves leg-side to tuck it into the leg-side. Closes his bat-face early and gets a leading edge that pops up in the air. Hardik Pandya misjudges and reacts late, but he times his jump perfectly in the end to snaffle it with his right hand.

full_text: Bhuvneshwar to Madhevere, Caught by Kohli!! Bhuvneshwar strikes on his first ball. This was pitched up by him outside off and it swung away a touch. Zimbabwe continue to feel the pressure.
